Do not use this template for public disclosure.

Follow [SECURITY.md](../../SECURITY.md) for the current reporting path.

## Scope

- Vulnerabilities in the checked APIs
- Incorrect security documentation
- Issues that could cause accidental misuse

## Notes

Provide only the minimum information needed to route the report privately.
